# LlmCall

> Individual LLM API call with cost and token tracking

## Fields

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| id | uuid | yes | auto | Primary key |
| traceId | string | yes | - | Associated trace ID for distributed tracing |
| spanId | string | yes | - | Associated span ID |
| model | string | yes | - | Model name (e.g. gpt-4, claude-3-opus) |
| provider | openai \| anthropic \| google \| mistral \| cohere \| local \| other | yes | - | LLM provider |
| promptHash | string | yes | - | SHA-256 hash of the prompt for dedup detection |
| promptTokens | integer | yes | - | Number of input tokens |
| completionTokens | integer | yes | - | Number of output tokens |
| totalTokens | integer | yes | - | Total tokens used |
| costUsd | float | yes | - | Cost in USD |
| durationMs | integer | yes | - | Response time in milliseconds |
| agentName | string | yes | - | Name of the agent or service that made the call |
| promptCategory | string | yes | - | Category for grouping (e.g. summarization, extraction) |
| cached | boolean | yes | false | Whether this was a cache hit |
| error | string | yes | - | Error message if the call failed |
| metadata | json | yes | - | Additional context (headers, params, etc.) |
| createdAt | datetime | yes | auto | Creation timestamp |
| updatedAt | datetime | yes | auto | Last update timestamp |

## Queries

- `costByModel`: `SELECT model, provider, COUNT(*) as call_count,
       SUM(costUsd) as total_cost, SUM(totalTokens) as total_tokens
FROM llm_call
WHERE createdAt >= $start AND createdAt <= $end
GROUP BY model, provider
ORDER BY total_cost DESC`
- `costByAgent`: `SELECT agentName, COUNT(*) as call_count,
       SUM(costUsd) as total_cost, AVG(durationMs) as avg_duration
FROM llm_call
WHERE createdAt >= $start AND createdAt <= $end
GROUP BY agentName
ORDER BY total_cost DESC`
- `duplicates`: `SELECT promptHash, model, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(costUsd) as wasted_cost
FROM llm_call
WHERE promptHash IS NOT NULL
  AND createdAt >= $start AND createdAt <= $end
GROUP BY promptHash, model
HAVING count > 1
ORDER BY wasted_cost DESC`
- `dailySpend`: `SELECT SUM(costUsd) as total_cost, COUNT(*) as call_count
FROM llm_call
WHERE date(createdAt) = date($day)`

## API Endpoints

- `GET /api/llm-call` — List all
- `POST /api/llm-call` — Create
- `GET /api/llm-call/:id` — Get by ID
- `PUT /api/llm-call/:id` — Update
- `DELETE /api/llm-call/:id` — Delete
